title: NIfTI Phantom Registry
description: Index of public NIfTI phantoms. Each entry points at a record hosted by a provider (e.g. Zenodo) that holds the phantom JSON and the NIfTI files it references. The registry only references data; it does not store it. Additional properties are allowed so the format can evolve in place. See REGISTRY.md.

phantoms.description: The registered phantoms. One entry per phantom; several entries may share a source record (a bundled phantom set).

phantom.description: A single registered phantom and its citable variants.

id.description: Unique registry key, conventionally the phantom name (e.g. 'subj42'). Must be unique across the registry.

description.description: One or two sentences describing the phantom.

license.description: Reuse terms as an SPDX license identifier (e.g. 'CC-BY-4.0', 'CC0-1.0').

collection.description: Optional free-text label grouping phantoms that share a source record / provenance.

source.description: Where the phantom data is hosted.

variants.description: The phantom JSON configurations inside the source record (e.g. one per field strength).

provider.description: Hosting provider. Only 'zenodo' is defined for now.

concept_doi.description: Concept DOI of the record; always resolves to its latest version.

doi.description: Version DOI: the exact, immutable record version this entry is pinned to (reproducibility).

file.description: Phantom JSON filename inside the source record.

B0.description: Optional main field strength [T], for discovery.
